title: Testing Object Collaborations and Contracts · Spiral Review
summary: Verify domain invariants, substitute implementations, event effects, persistence, and refactoring safety. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a contract-tested object system after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test constructor and mutation invariants across valid boundaries, invalid inputs, and unchanged-state failures.
Test object collaboration through outcomes and role boundaries without over-specifying internal call order.
Choose real objects, fakes, stubs, spies, or mocks based on speed, determinism, behavior fidelity, and diagnostic value.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
